title: NodeDisplacement
description: NodeDisplacement: Resulting displacements and rotations for a Node.

UX.description: Translational displacement in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UY.description: Translational displacement in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UZ.description: Translational displacement in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RX.description: Rotational displacement about the X-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RY.description: Rotational displacement about the Y-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RZ.description: Rotational displacement about the Z-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Orientation.description: Defines the directionality of the results. Defaults to global XYZ. Basis: An ordered set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors defining three-dimensional orientation in space

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
